leadText: Throat Spray (Japanese: のどスプレー Throat Spray) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] After the Pokémon holding Throat Spray uses a sound-based move , it consumes the item and its Special Attack is raised by one stage. Throat Spray is not used if the move fails, or finishes the battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder uses a sound-based move, this throat spray will boost its Sp. Atk stat.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Motostoke Battle Tower (10 BP ) Sw Sh CT Snowslide Slope S V Delibird Presents ( Mesagoza Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh Rock Star Shiny Toxtricity All February 19 to June 30, 2021

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Despite Pokémon being stated to be unable to use manmade healing items when held, the appearance of Throat Spray is similar to the appearance of spray-type Potions .
